Contractor|BountyDescription:
Crusader is continuing its effort to make our little sector of Stanton as safe possible and we need your help.

A suspect by the name of [TargetName] has been a real thorn in our side and it'd be great if you could settle the outstanding bounty on them once and for all. They were last seen at [Location|Address].

[Danger] Crusader Security


CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Bautista
ID# 948J030K

Got a bounty that we need found and apprehended - [TargetName] last seen at [Location|Address]. They're offering a pretty decent price to bring them in which never hurts.

[Danger] Crusader Security


CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Bautista
ID# 948J030K

Crusader, in accordance with UEE Law, has issued a bounty for [TargetName]. You are charged with locating and apprehending this criminal in exchange for the stated payment. They were last seen at [Location|Address].

[Danger] Crusader Security


CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Bautista
ID# 948J030K

Some low level skav who goes by the name [TargetName] has been making a real nuisance of themselves. Finally got the authorization to put a bounty on their head. Find them and take care of it. They were last seen at [Location|Address].

All goes to plan, we get [TargetName|Last] off the streets and you get a nice little payday. Win-win. 

[Danger] Crusader Security


CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Gibbs
ID# 91G66BW0

This might end up being a bit like sending a sheep after a wolf, but I'm hoping you can collect the bounty on [TargetName] for me. Tracking them down shouldn't be that hard since they've been making quite a name for themselves lately. They were last seen at [Location|Address].

[Danger] Crusader Security
